Generation Metadata

- Generation Date: 2026-07-07
- Input Files Used:

  - dist/20260707/manuscript_non_traumatic_sah_phenotypes.md

Description:
This directory contains the generated analysis results, figures, and reporting artifacts for the non-traumatic subarachnoid hemorrhage (non-traumatic SAH) study. The English and Chinese manuscript markdown files in this folder were generated/translated by Gemini (Gemini 3.5 Flash) / Antigravity using the above input sources.
